units.content: GUM defines metrological sensitivity coefficients c_i = df/dx_i as structured numerical inputs to uncertainty-propagation computations
Claim 8a's sensitivity sets are hand-authored qualitative property-to-attribute dictionaries
GUM's construction concerns uncertainty propagation via computed Jacobian rows
Claim 8a's construction concerns divergence-location prediction via qualitative attribute dictionaries
GUM and claim 8a are orthogonal: GUM performs uncertainty propagation using computed Jacobian rows while claim 8a performs divergence-location prediction using hand-authored qualitative dictionaries
